scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build && npx cap copy android
scripts.android:install: npm run cap:sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home ./gradlew installDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run cap:sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:bundle: npm run cap:sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home ./gradlew bundleRelease
